The AhR-mediated induction of CYP1A1/CYP1A2 represents a reliable biological response linked directly to pharmacological action via modulating toxin metabolism and immune responses. Clinical efficacy demonstrated by tapinarof validates AhR ligands' utility as targeted therapeutics in diseases involving dysregulated immunity and tissue damage.

Final Answer: Yes
